suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten procedure reporting or review guidance so handoffs do not mark followedProcedure=true when transcript order shows targeted failing verification was added only after implementation edits.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both the sample-diagnostics-claim-contract-hardening and sample-secondary-diagnostic-allowlist-hardening reviews found repo-tooling-worker sessions whose transcript skeletons showed implementation edits before the later targeted verifier/test additions, while both handoffs reported skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true with no deviations.
